summary: Iteration 8: UX Polish Review - All 7 features tested and verified working correctly. Comprehensive testing of toolbar overflow menu, group labels casing, panel icon tooltips, tab status badge tooltips, window domain summaries, homepage content sections, and overflow menu interactions.
passed_tests: Toolbar: Primary buttons (New Tab, Window, Domain, Heatmap, Focus) are visible
Toolbar: 'More' overflow button visible and functional
Toolbar: Overflow menu contains all 6 items (Suspend Inactive, Resume All, Mute All, Unmute All, Close Duplicates, Save Session)
Group labels: Work, Research, Media, Shopping - all in mixed/Title case (NOT ALL CAPS)
Group labels: Using font-semibold styling as expected
Panel icons: Timeline, Notes, Workspaces, Auto-Close, Help, Settings buttons visible
Panel icons: Tooltips appear on hover (verified Timeline, Workspaces, Help)
Panel icons: Good contrast with text-foreground/50 styling
Tab badges: Pin badge found with 'Pinned tab' tooltip
Tab badges: Duplicate badges present on duplicate tabs
Tab badges: Audio badge found with 'Playing audio' tooltip
Window summaries: All 3 windows show domain summary with '+X more' format
Window summaries: Summary text is in italic styling
Homepage: Hero section with TabPilot branding and description
Homepage: Quick Start section with 4 instruction cards
Homepage: Features section with all 12 feature cards
Homepage: All 12 feature cards have data-testid attributes
Homepage: Feature cards have icon, title, and description
Homepage: Keyboard Shortcuts section present
Overflow interactions: 'Suspend Inactive' click shows toast 'Suspended 8 inactive tabs'
Overflow interactions: 'Mute All' click shows toast 'All tabs muted'

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All 7 UX polish features verified working

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 8 UX polish review complete. All features verified: (1) Toolbar overflow menu with More button and 6 secondary actions, (2) Tab group headers in mixed-case with semibold styling, (3) Panel icons with tooltips and good contrast, (4) Tab status badges (pin, duplicate, audio) with tooltips, (5) Window domain summaries with '+X more' format in italic, (6) Homepage with hero, quick start (4 cards), features (12 cards with data-testids), and shortcuts sections, (7) Overflow menu actions trigger proper toasts. Key data-testids: action-more-menu, action-suspend-inactive, action-mute-all, tab-group-header-{id}, pin-badge-{id}, dupe-badge-{id}, audio-badge-{id}, hero-section, quick-start-section, feature-showcase, feature-card-{name}, shortcuts-section.

mocked_integrations.Chrome tabs API: Web preview uses mock data via useMockTabs.js hook

features_verified.1_toolbar_overflow_menu: PASS - Primary buttons visible, More button opens dropdown with all 6 secondary actions
features_verified.2_group_labels_casing: PASS - Work, Research, Media, Shopping in mixed/Title case with font-semibold
features_verified.3_panel_icon_tooltips: PASS - 6 panel icons with tooltips and good contrast (text-foreground/50)
features_verified.4_tab_status_badges: PASS - Pin badge shows 'Pinned tab', audio badge shows 'Playing audio', duplicate badges visible
features_verified.5_window_domain_summaries: PASS - All windows show 'domain1, domain2 +X more' format in italic
features_verified.6_homepage_content: PASS - Hero, Quick Start (4 cards), Features (12 cards with data-testids), Shortcuts sections
features_verified.7_overflow_menu_interactions: PASS - Suspend Inactive and Mute All both trigger success toasts
